column1: Jonny DeLuca headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks, boasting a scorching 74.3% hit probability as he steps into the two-hole for Atlanta on the road. With a steady bat and a clear platoon advantage against Chris Sale, DeLuca’s reliable profile makes him a no-brainer for streak chasers. Right behind him, Kyle Stowers leads off for Miami in a favorable home park and enjoys his own platoon edge, setting the table for a strong chance to reach safely. Xavier Edwards and Luke Keaschall also offer top-of-order opportunities and solid matchups, but DeLuca’s combination of order, matchup, and consistency puts him firmly at the top of today’s list.
